zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，空头略占优势
zh.content:
AVAX/USD当前维持低位窄幅整理，价格运行在9.24美元附近，24小时波动有限，显示市场观望情绪较浓。由于价格仍低于20日均线9.3177，短线趋势暂未摆脱偏空结构，反弹力度相对有限。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持在零轴下方，且数值为负，说明空头动能尚未完全释放结束。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合近期价格表现来看，市场缺乏明显超买或超卖信号，短期更可能延续弱势震荡节奏。

关键支撑位可关注9.21美元附近，该区域对应日内低点，一旦跌破可能进一步下探9.00美元整数关口。上方阻力则位于9.32美元至9.40美元区间，若无法有效站稳20日均线，反弹空间预计仍会受到压制。

交易策略方面，短线投资者宜保持谨慎，优先关注区间交易机会。激进者可在9.21美元附近轻仓试多，但需严格设置止损；若价格放量突破9.32美元，则有望打开进一步反弹空间，中线可适度跟随。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is trading near 9.24, showing a narrowly positive 24-hour performance while remaining under moderate bearish pressure. Price action continues to hover below the 20-day simple moving average at 9.3177, suggesting short-term momentum has not yet shifted decisively bullish. The tight intraday range between 9.2109 and 9.2446 reflects indecision among traders, with market participants waiting for stronger directional confirmation before establishing larger positions.

The MACD reading of -0.0076 indicates lingering downside momentum, although the negative value is relatively shallow and may point to weakening bearish strength rather than aggressive selling. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies more heavily on moving averages and price structure. If AVAX can reclaim and sustain movement above the SMA(20), sentiment could improve quickly. Until then, rallies may continue to face selling pressure near overhead resistance zones.

Immediate support appears near 9.21, aligning closely with the session low and acting as a short-term defensive level for buyers. A breakdown below this area could expose AVAX to additional downside toward the psychological 9.00 region. On the upside, resistance is forming around 9.32, followed by a stronger barrier near 9.50 if bullish momentum accelerates. A decisive close above resistance would strengthen the case for a broader recovery phase in the near term.

From a trading perspective, cautious range trading may remain the preferred strategy while volatility stays compressed. Conservative traders could wait for confirmation above 9.32 before considering bullish entries, targeting gradual upside continuation. Short-term bearish setups may become attractive only if support at 9.21 fails convincingly. Risk management remains essential, as the current low-momentum environment can produce false breakouts and rapid reversals without sustained volume confirmation.
